content: Battle.net OAuth 2.0: standard authorization code flow at oauth.battle.net. PKCE supported for public clients. Blizzard provides sample clients on GitHub (Blizzard/oauth-client-sample). Scopes include WoW character data, SC2 profile; WC3-specific data access through Blizzard API is limited/minimal. The w3champions identification-service wraps Blizzard OAuth to create w3champions-specific identity. Better Auth (recommended for TanStack Start) supports custom OAuth providers but Battle.net not built-in — needs custom provider config using standard OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow.
